mapper.select: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, SDI_IDX, MEMBER_KEY, TYPE, KEYWORD, ADD_ID, ADD_DATE, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_DATE, (SELECT A.CODE_NAME FROM CMS_CODE A WHERE A.GROUP_ID = 'C0011' AND A.CODE_ID = SDI.TYPE) AS TYPE_NAME FROM SDI WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key}
SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, SDI_IDX, MEMBER_KEY, TYPE, KEYWORD, ADD_ID, ADD_DATE, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_DATE FROM SDI WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND SDI_IDX = #{sdi_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE SDI SET TYPE = #{type}, KEYWORD = #{keyword}, MODIFY_ID = #{modify_id}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND SDI_IDX = #{sdi_idx}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SDI WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND SDI_IDX = #{sdi_idx}
